recommendations.title: Now, Voyager
recommendations.overview: A woman suffers a nervous breakdown and an oppressive mother before being freed by the love of a man she meets on a cruise.

recommendations.title: Deadline
recommendations.overview: A screenwriter travels to an abandoned house to finish a script on time, but a series of strange events lead her to a psychological breakdown.

recommendations.title: Woman in the Dunes
recommendations.overview: A vacationing entomologist suffers extreme physical and psychological trauma after being taken captive by the residents of a poor seaside village and made to live with a woman whose life task is shoveling sand for them.

recommendations.title: Sounds Like Love
recommendations.overview: Fashion assistant Maca has just about got her life together after a devastating breakup, when Leo, the man who broke her heart returns. Seeking support from best friends, Adriana and Jime, all three will learn love can be complicated.

recommendations.title: Mystic River
recommendations.overview: The lives of three men who were childhood friends are shattered when one of them suffers a family tragedy.

recommendations.title: World's Greatest Dad
recommendations.overview: In the wake of a freak accident, Lance suffers the worst tragedy and the greatest opportunity of his life. He is suddenly faced with the possibility of fame, fortune and popularity, if he can only live with the knowledge of how he got there.

recommendations.title: The Headless Woman
recommendations.overview: After running into something with her car, Vero experiences a particular psychological state. She realizes she might have killed someone.

recommendations.title: Two
recommendations.overview: Two people, a man and a woman, wake up naked and with their abdomens attached to each other.

recommendations.title: Anatomy of a Love Seen
recommendations.overview: A film within a film that explores love in all its painful and messy glory.  Six months ago Zoe and Mal fell for each other while filming a love scene, which led to an intense, whirlwind affair, followed by a devastating breakup. Soon after their spl

recommendations.title: Wakefield
recommendations.overview: A man's nervous breakdown causes him to leave his wife and live in his attic for several months.
